subject: A reptilian viashino warrior — a lithe lizard-person with reddish-brown scales — sprinting across rubble-strewn ground brandishing a curved blade
description: A viashino warrior — a humanoid reptile with reddish-brown scaled hide, an elongated snout, and a long whipping tail — charges forward in a dynamic running pose across broken urban rubble. The figure wields a curved scimitar-like blade in one clawed hand and is mid-stride, body lunged forward with predatory speed. The background is a smoky, fiery haze in dusty orange and ochre tones, evoking a ruined city district. Lighting is warm and ambient with dust and ember particles catching the light. The composition emphasizes motion and ambush — low angle, the lizard-warrior bounding toward the viewer through wreckage.
foreground: viashino warrior mid-charge with curved blade, broken stone and rubble at his feet
background: smoke-choked ruined cityscape in hazy orange and dust
emotion: predatory focus, aggressive charge, ambush intent
